summary_en: MRK Holdings acquired 4,062,000 shares (4.2% of outstanding) for ¥406.2M via ToSTNeT-3 on 18 May 2026 as part of flexible capital management and shareholder returns.
title_en: Results of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Auction Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
MRK Holdings Inc. (TSE Standard 9980) announced the completion of a treasury stock acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 (off-auction purchase transaction) on 18 May 2026. The company repurchased 4,062,000 ordinary shares for a total consideration of ¥406.2 million at an average price of approximately ¥100 per share.

The buyback was authorized under board resolutions dated 25 February 2026 and 15 May 2026, which approved acquisition of up to 6,000,000 shares (6.2% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥600 million over the period 26 February 2026 to 25 February 2027. The acquisition methods include both market purchases and ToSTNeT-3 transactions.

The stated purpose is to implement flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions and to provide profit returns to shareholders. This transaction represents partial execution of the authorized buyback program, with ¥193.8 million remaining under the ¥600 million authorization limit.
